item.title: Deep Sky
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 3:20 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Deep Sky brings the awe-inspiring images captured by NASA’s JWST to IMAX® — taking audiences on a journey to the beginning of time and space.

Event details

item.title: Deep Sky
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 3:20 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Deep Sky brings the awe-inspiring images captured by NASA’s JWST to IMAX® — taking audiences on a journey to the beginning of time and space.

Event details

item.title: Space: The New Frontier
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

NASA and international space agencies push the boundaries of space exploration, expanding scientific and engineering limits to enhance life on Earth.

Event details

item.title: T. Rex 2D
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Experience the ultimate G.O.A.T. — Greatest of All Tyrants — as it roars to life on the giant screen in the film, T. rex.

Event details

item.title: Blue Whales: Return of the Giants
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 2:10 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Award-winning actor, Andy Serkis, narrates this stunning IMAX film that brings the world’s largest animal to the world’s largest screen.

Event details

item.title: Deep Sky
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 3:20 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Deep Sky brings the awe-inspiring images captured by NASA’s JWST to IMAX® — taking audiences on a journey to the beginning of time and space.

Event details

item.title: Project Hail Mary
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 3:45 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

From deep space to the biggest screen. Experience Project Hail Mary on the most immersive IMAX experience in the Pacific Northwest.

Event details

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Mario ventures into space, exploring cosmic worlds and tackling galactic challenges far from the familiar Mushroom Kingdom.

Event details

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Mario ventures into space, exploring cosmic worlds and tackling galactic challenges far from the familiar Mushroom Kingdom.

Event details

item.title: Space: The New Frontier
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

NASA and international space agencies push the boundaries of space exploration, expanding scientific and engineering limits to enhance life on Earth.

Event details

item.title: Oceans: Our Blue Planet
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 11:45 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

From BBC Earth and OceanX Media, this documentary takes us on a global odyssey to discover the largest and least explored habitat on Earth

Event details

item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

item.title: Wild Rescue 2D
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 11:45 AM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Based on the work at the Santa Barbara Wildlife Care Network, Wild Rescue follows the teams who rescue and rehabilitate injured wild animals.

Event details

item.title: Cave of Forgotten Dreams 3D
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Fully restored for IMAX, this documentary immerses you deep inside the mysterious natural cathedral where art began, France’s Chauvet Cave.

Event details

item.title: Cave of Forgotten Dreams 3D
item.description:
Sunday, April 19, 2026 at 2:10 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Fully restored for IMAX, this documentary immerses you deep inside the mysterious natural cathedral where art began, France’s Chauvet Cave.

Event details

item.title: Michael
item.description:
Wednesday, April 22, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: PACCAR IMAX Theater, Pacific Science Center

Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known.

Event details
